costs_slippage.handling: qfa CLI has no native cost flag; external target-weight turnover haircut applied to qfa/Alpaca replay.

data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa backtest and qfa AlpacaGateway; no CSV fixtures.

orthogonality.method: Pearson correlation of overlapping daily cost-adjusted equity returns.

turnover.method: Ex-post target-weight replay; one_way_turnover = 0.5 * sum(abs(w_t - w_t-1)); daily cost = turnover * 5 bps subtracted from portfolio return.

warnings: No daemon was run and no trades were placed.
Never used --data-csv; all data came from Alpaca/qfa.
Temporary SQLite DB removed after extracting metrics.
Daily Alpaca bars lack auction-only close imbalance/volume; signal remains a proxy.
